message:
⚡ Eagerly import all dashboard pages — eliminate blank skeleton on navigation (#929)

All sidebar-navigable dashboard pages are now eagerly imported instead of
React.lazy(). This prevents the ContentLoadingSkeleton (6 blank dark boxes)
from appearing on initial load or navigation. Card components inside
dashboards are still lazy-loaded but caught by a new Suspense boundary
in CardWrapper so they show per-card skeletons instead of blanking the
whole page.

Changes:
- App.tsx: Convert 28 dashboard pages from lazy() to eager imports
- CardWrapper.tsx: Add Suspense boundary around {children} for lazy cards
- Layout.tsx: Remove key={pathname} from Suspense (no longer needed)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
